reasoning: Koren, your main limiter is lactate clearance and aerobic endurance. Your last ride shows extended rest; thus, we'll start controlled. The main climb on the Alpine Loop demands consistent higher power. This workout targets your ability to handle sustained efforts and better manage lactic acid.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 min over-unders (5 min @ 242W, 5 min @ 218W), short 1-min recoveries

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
